title: pyrethrum armenum
intro: Pyrethrum armenum, also known as Tanacetum coccineum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrethrum armenum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
